title: cleisostoma clemensiae
intro: Cleisostoma clemensiae is a species of orchid that is native to the Philippines. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include the ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. The health benefits of Cleisostoma clemensiae include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared in herbal teas or infusions, or dried and used in poultices to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
